title: eriogonum gilmanii
intro: Eriogonum gilmanii, also known as the Gilman's buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum gilmanii include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Eriogonum gilmanii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
